seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The email must be written in a professional and respectful tone, tailored for an academic audience.
new_constraint: Write the email in an informal tone, tailored for a casual audience.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The email must be written in a professional and respectful tone, tailored for an academic audience. Write the email in an informal tone, tailored for a casual audience.
response:
Here are both versions of the email, tailored to the specific tones you requested:

***

## 📧 Professional and Respectful Tone (For an Academic Audience)

**Subject:** Request for Extension - [Your Name] - [Course Name] Project

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to respectfully request a short extension on the [Name of Project] assignment, which is currently due on [Date, e.g., Wednesday, October 25th].

Due to [**Brief, professional reason—e.g., an unexpected family commitment, a heavier than anticipated workload this week, or a minor technical issue**], I have fallen slightly behind in my progress and do not feel I can submit my best work by the original deadline.

Would it be possible to have an extension until [**Propose a specific, reasonable new date—e.g., Friday evening, October 27th**]? I am confident that with this additional time, I can submit a thorough and high-quality project that meets your expectations.

Thank you very much for considering my request. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID Number]

***

## 📧 Informal Tone (For a Casual Audience)

**Subject:** Quick question about the [Project Name] deadline

Hey Professor [Professor's Last Name],

Hope you're having a good week!

I was wondering if there was any chance I could get a little more time on the [Name of Project]? It's due in two days, and honestly, I'm running into a bit of a snag with [**Brief, casual reason—e.g., this last section is taking way longer than I thought, or I got swamped with another assignment this week**].

Would it be cool if I turned it in on [**Propose a specific, casual new date—e.g., Friday instead?**]? I just want to make sure I give it the attention it deserves instead of rushing it at the last minute.

Let me know if that works or if there's anything else I should do.

Thanks so much!

Best,

[Your Name]<turn|>
